gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCE_SOURCES AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.EST_FINANCE_GOVT_ASSISTANCE = 0.000 AND T2.EST_FINANCE_BORROW_INSTITUTION = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_FINANCE_SOURCES_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
FROM DIM_LOCATION dl
JOIN FACT_FINANCE_SOURCES ffs ON dl.LOCATION_ID = ffs.LOCATION_ID
WHERE ffs.EST_FINANCE_GOVT_ASSISTANCE = 0.000
  AND ffs.EST_FINANCE_BORROW_INSTITUTION = 0.000
ORDER BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC;
raw_output:

question: सबसे हाल की उपलब्ध जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, प्रत्येक यूएलबी/आरएलबी गाँव का नाम, कुल अनुमानित सरकारी वित्तीय सहायता और उधार संस्थानों से कुल अनुमानित वित्त के साथ, गाँव के नाम के अनुसार समूहित करें और कुल सरकारी सहायता के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_FINANCE_GOVT_ASSISTANCE), SUM(T2.EST_FINANCE_BORROW_INSTITUTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCE_SOURCES AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_FINANCE_GOVT_ASSISTANCE) DESC
